/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llama-tts.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/llama-tts.dir/tts.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-tts  ../../libllama.a ../../libllama-common.a ../../libllama.a ../../libggml.a -ldl ../../libggml-cpu.a ../../libggml-base.a -lm /usr/lib/libgomp.so /usr/lib/libpthread.a ../../libllama-common-base.a ../../libcpp-httplib.a
